title: Timber Pole Retaining Wall Design as Per NZGS Module 6
description: Timber Pole Retaining Wall Design as Per NZGS Module 6

H_w.description: Height of Wall, H_w. Symbol: H_w. Units: mm

s.description: Pole spacing, s. Symbol: s. Units: mm

uses_round.description: Using Pole for Piles? (alternative is square section)

D_p.description: Timber Pole Diameter, D_p. Symbol: D_p. Units: mm. Timber Pole Diameter, D_p uses Small end diameter (SED)

D_hole.description: Hole Diameter, D_hole. Symbol: D_{hole}. Units: mm

H_s.description: Timber pole embedment, H_s. Symbol: H_s. Units: mm

β_deg.description: Slope of Backwall, β. Symbol: β_{deg}. Units: °

i.description: Slope of Backfill, i. Symbol: i. Units: °

H_L.description: Height of double board, H_L. Symbol: H_L. Units: mm

ht.description: Height of single board, ht. Symbol: ht. Units: mm

thk.description: Thickness of single board, thk. Symbol: thk. Units: mm

fp_b.description: Timber Pole Strength, fp_b. Symbol: fp_b. Units: MPa. Timber Pole Strength, fp_b

fb_b.description: Timber Board Strength, fb_b. Symbol: fb_b. Units: MPa. Timber Board Strength, fb_b

k_4.description: Parallel factor (k_4) for boards. Symbol: k_4

Ø_b.description: Soil Friction Angle, Backfill, Ø_b. Symbol: Ø_b. Units: °

Øn_deg.description: Soil Friction Angle, Native, Ø_n. Symbol: Øn_deg. Units: °

γ_b.description: Soil Unit Weight, Backfill, γ_b. Symbol: γ_b. Units: kN/m^3

γ_n.description: Soil Unit Weight, Native, γ_n. Symbol: γ_n. Units: kN/m^3

w_s.description: Factored Surcharge, w_s. Symbol: w_s. Units: kPa

a_max.description: Maximum acceleration, a_max. Symbol: a_{max}. Units: g

w_d.description: Wall Displacement Factor, w_d. Symbol: w_d

wd link.description: See Table 5.2 of Module 6 for Situations and Values

a_topo.description: Topographic Amplification factor, a_topo. Symbol: a_{topo}
